prompt:
STYLE LOCK: Period gothic live-action, mid-19th-century interiors; candlelight and deep shadows; desaturated cool-gray palette; naturalistic skin and fabric texture; no illustration or stylized animation

CHARACTER VARIABLES (use these identities consistently; do not redesign faces or wardrobe):
- Character_The_Narrator <IMAGE_1> [The Narrator]: Lean man of middle years (about 40–50), pale sallow skin, hollow cheeks, dark disordered medium-length hair, bright intense dark eyes, thin tense mouth; plain dark wool waistcoat over white shirtsleeves, dark trousers; period clothing. Visual lock: Same lean pale face, dark disordered hair, and bright intense dark eyes in every scene; always plain dark waistcoat and shirtsleeves as default; never elderly, never white-haired, never the filmed blue eye. Voice: Male, middle years; medium-high tense pitch; precise, controlled pace that sharpens into fevered urgency; intimate confessional energy, same voice on-camera and in V.O. Match appearance of reference <IMAGE_1> exactly.

CAST COUNT: exactly 1 distinct on-screen character identity(ies) only — Character_The_Narrator. Do not invent extra people, duplicate faces, or crowd extras not listed.

AUDIO: REQUIRED native Grok dialogue. Character_The_Narrator ON CAMERA lip-syncs exactly: "Now this is the point. You fancy me mad. Madmen know nothing.". Start speaking immediately with "Now" — do not skip, delay, or swallow the opening word. After the last word, hold a brief natural pause with a closed mouth (about half a second); do not freeze mid-syllable or trail into empty staring. Other mouths closed. Speech intelligible; never silent. Secondary layer = soft room tone / Foley. VOICE LOCK Character_The_Narrator: Male, middle years; medium-high tense pitch; precise, controlled pace that sharpens into fevered urgency; intimate confessional energy, same voice on-camera and in V.O.

Follow the camera framing and location in this prompt exactly. Prioritize the PRIMARY subject and ONE clear action with visible motion; background characters may stay mostly still.

THIS CLIP:
End cleanly when the spoken line and primary action finish — do not hold a frozen pose or empty silence after dialogue.
INT. BARE ROOM - NIGHT. THE NARRATOR rises a little in his chair, eager, precise. The Narrator speaks. Character_The_Narrator <IMAGE_1> ON CAMERA lip-syncs "Now this is the point. You fancy me mad. Madmen know nothing.". Character_The_Narrator <IMAGE_1> still wears plain dark waistcoat, white shirtsleeves, tailored trousers Camera directive: Medium shot, 35mm lens, slow push-in as Narrator rises eagerly in chair, eyes sharp and precise. Performance: Acting intensity 7/10: Sharp eager wide eyes with precise tight smile and insistent brow Optics: f/1.4 shallow depth of field, creamy background bokeh Color grading: Kodak Vision3 500T 5219, desaturated cool-blue shadows, pale neutrals, deep charcoal blacks / 480p, 24fps

NEGATIVE: no legible text, no watermarks, no logos, no extra limbs, blur/obscure environmental signage or screens, no name tags, no name badges, no embroidered names, no lower thirds, no personal names on clothing or props, no extra unmentioned hats or jackets, no modern wristwatches, no electric light bulbs, no plastic, no zippers, no modern cars, no printed logos, no denim, no asphalt, no modern hair gel, no sneakers, no fluorescent lights, no power outlets, no smartphones.
